Now streaming on Disney+."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taylor_Swift:_The_End_of_an_Era","title":"Taylor Swift: The End of an Era - Wikipedia","content":"The End of an Era is a follow-up to Swift's 2023 concert film, Taylor Swift: The Eras Tour, which documented the Los Angeles shows of the tour.
The first two episodes of the series premiered alongside a second concert film, subtitled The Final Show, which captures the tour's last show in Vancouver.
On October 13, 2025, Swift announced on the daytime television show Good Morning America two more Eras Tour-inspired releases via Disney+ on December 12, a day before her 36th birthday: the six-episode docuseries, Taylor Swift: The End of an Era, and a concert film capturing the tour's final show at Vancouver, Canada, titled The Eras Tour: The Final Show.
A preview special, featuring the first episode of The End of an Era and one hour of The Final Show, aired on ABC on December 12.
Nielsen Media Research, which records streaming viewership on certain U.S. television screens, reported that it garnered 377 million minutes of watch time from December 22–28, ranking it as the tenth most-streamed original series that week.
TheWrap's Matthew Creith considered it a revealing and hearty watch.
Miss Americana, a 2020 autobiographical documentary film about Swift's life and career"},{"url":"https://www.newsweek.com/entertainment/tv/taylor-swift-the-end-of-an-era-docuseries-release-date-schedule-how-to-watch-11192190","title":"‘Taylor Swift – The End of an Era’ Docuseries – Release Date, Schedule, How to Watch - Newsweek","content":"The six-episode series gets its start tomorrow on the streaming platform, with two new episodes releasing weekly through December 26.
Designed to give fans an intimate look at Taylor Swift's life throughout the Eras tour, the series also spotlights fellow performers such as Sabrina Carpenter, Ed Sheeran, Florence Welch, and Gracie Abrams, as well as Swift's family members and friends.
"Taylor Swift – The End of an Era" will be available on Disney+ from Midnight Pacific Time (PT) on December 12, 2025/3 am Eastern Time (ET)."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/feature/taylor-swift-eras-tour-docuseries-release-schedule-1236644006/","title":"Taylor Swift's Eras Tour Docuseries Release Schedule On Disney+","content":"Taylor Swift is celebrating her biggest ever stadium tour comprised of most of her different albums and eras with an inside look into the monster five plus hour concerts and more.
The docuseries will debut with its first two episodes on Disney+ Dec.
ABC will also air the first episode that night at 8 p.m.
It will feature a new acoustic set as well as the added section in the lineup devoted to Swift’s newest album at the time, The Tortured Poets Department.
Besides Swift herself, the doc will also feature special guests Swift had on stage throughout the tour like Gracie Abrams, Sabrina Carpenter, Ed Sheeran, her now fiancé Travis Kelce, Florence Welch as well as her band, dancers, crew and family members."}]}

Then it goes back to my mother, Marjorie.","score":0.68090034,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taylor_Swift:_The_End_of_an_Era","title":"Taylor Swift: The End of an Era - Wikipedia","content":"| *Taylor Swift: The Eras Tour: The Final Show* |. ***Taylor Swift: The End of an Era*** (stylized as ***Taylor Swift | The End of an Era***) is a 2025 American documentary miniseries about the singer-songwriter Taylor Swift's sixth concert tour, The Eras Tour (2023–2024), directed by filmmakers Don Argott and Sheena M. In the series*,* Swift and crew discuss the creative development, logistics, cultural impact and personal sentiments of the Eras Tour, which became Swift's most profitable tour to-date and the highest-grossing tour of all time. *The End of an Era* is a follow-up to Swift's 2023 concert film, *Taylor Swift: The Eras Tour*, which documented the Los Angeles shows of the tour.
